mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book_skeletons (id, skeleton_key, version, name, page_type, photo_count, canvas_width, canvas_height, slot_defs, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{skeletonKey}, #{version}, #{name}, #{pageType}, #{photoCount}, #{canvasWidth}, #{canvasHeight}, #{slotDefs}::jsonb, COALESCE(#{isActive,jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, TRUE), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE book_skeletons SET name = #{name}, page_type = #{pageType}, photo_count = #{photoCount}, canvas_width = #{canvasWidth}, canvas_height = #{canvasHeight}, slot_defs = #{slotDefs}::jsonb, is_active = #{isActive,jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM book_skeletons WHERE skeleton_key = #{skeletonKey} AND is_active = TRUE ORDER BY version DESC, updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM book_skeletons ORDER BY skeleton_key ASC, version DESC

SELECT * FROM book_skeletons
skeleton_key IN
#{key}
ORDER BY skeleton_key ASC, version DESC
